Settings
Manage system configuration · Use the tabs below to navigate
👥 People · Team Members
Manage your team roster, assign roles, set compensation types, and configure profiles. This is the source of truth for everyone who works on FCV jobs.
🏖 Time-Off & Scheduling Policies
Firmwide rules governing time off and how it affects job assignments
📅 PTO Allotment Policy
Company-wide tiered allotment of time off based on years of service · Overridable per person by authorized roles
📋 Assignment Eligibility Rules
Control when team members can be assigned to jobs based on scheduled time off · Compares each person's approved days off against the job's due date
🔒 Sub-Contractor Access Policy
Default access for everyone flagged as a sub-contractor · Per-person overrides on individual profiles take precedence
🌍 Public Holidays
Manage the firmwide observed holiday list and per-country catalog for international staff · Super Admin and Admin only
⏰ PTO Advance-Notice Policy
Required lead time for time-off requests, banded by duration · Creates accountability for advance planning · Super Admin and Admin only
🤝 Client Setup
Configure per-client policies: MSA designation, pre-negotiated fee schedules, invoicing instructions, delivery instructions, and linked client user accounts.
🔐 Access Control
Define roles, set permissions, and configure security policies. Drag role cards within or across categories to reorganize.
Roles & Permissions
Each role has a set of permissions and a category · Drag to reorder · Hover the (i) icon for descriptions
💰 Salary Budget Access
Specific users who can view the Salary Fund's Budget Analysis (income vs expense) · Super Admins always have access · Use this to grant select PMs and admins access without affecting their role permissions
PIN & Security Policies
Authentication rules and account lockout policies
🔒
PIN Security Configuration
Set minimum PIN length, force periodic resets, auto-lock after failed attempts, and configure 2FA requirements. Coming soon — current default is 4-digit PIN with no lockout policy.
🏗 Structure · Layout & Visual Configuration
Customize how the app is organized visually: sidebar navigation, map pin colors, and the state licensing map shading. Changes apply firmwide.
📐 Sidebar Layout
Customize navigation order and section grouping per role · Items hidden by role permissions never appear regardless of layout
Layout Source
Sidebar Structure
Available Items
Drag into any section, or click + to append
💡 How it works: The Default Layout applies to all roles unless a role has a custom layout. Items hidden by role permissions never appear in the sidebar regardless of layout. New nav items added in future updates automatically append to the end of every layout.
📍 Map Pin Colors
Status-based pin colors used on the Job Tracker map and Map View · Each color encodes a specific job status
🗺 State Licensing Map Shading
Five-tier color scale for the State Licensing coverage map · Each tier reflects coverage strength
📋 Admin Audit Log
Chronological record of every PIN-confirmed admin action. Filter, search, and export to CSV for compliance review.
💰 Financial Settings
Firm-wide financial defaults: commission splits, payment terms, and tax configuration.
Commission Split Defaults
Firm-wide allocation percentages applied to every job · Each percent is the share of the job's NET (fee minus expenses) that a person in that role earns · Per-job overrides on the Fees tab
Tax & Payroll Defaults
1099 thresholds, withholding rules, default tax IDs
📊
Tax Configuration
Configure 1099-NEC thresholds, default EIN, sales tax handling per state, and W-9 collection workflows. Coming soon.
🏢 Firm Identity
Your firm's contact information, branding, compliance documents, and email templates used throughout the system.
Firm Information
Legal name, contact addresses, default emails, and compliance contact · Used in cover letters, invoices, and outbound emails
Company Brand Profile
Upload your logo and set brand colors · Applied to the sidebar, page accents, primary buttons, and section breaks throughout the app
Email Templates
Reusable email templates with attachments and variable substitution · Linked to buttons throughout the app (W-9 request, ACH instructions, document request, etc.)
Firm Documents
Compliance docs sent to clients on demand · 1099/W-9, banking ACH instructions, certificate of insurance, etc.
⚙ Lists & Formatting
Dropdown menus used throughout the system, job number generation rules, and default values for new jobs.
Job Number Format
Configure how new job numbers are generated · Customize prefix, year format, digit count, and next sequence number
Dropdown Menus
Option lists used in job forms, filters, and reports
New Job Defaults
Default values pre-populated when creating new jobs
📝
Default Field Values
Set default priority, status, due-date offset, invoice schedule, report brand, and inspection requirements for new jobs. Coming soon.
🔧 System Configuration
Integrations with external services, notification preferences, data export/backup, and destructive actions.
🗺️ Maps & Geocoding
Configure Google Maps for property locations across the system
Google Maps API Key
Required for Google Maps display across the Map View page, Job Tracker, and Property Details. Without a key, the system falls back to OpenStreetMap (free but slower geocoding). Get a key at Google Cloud Console.
Stored in your firm's settings. Make sure your key restrictions allow this domain.
Integrations
Connect FCV Ops to external systems
📞
GoHighLevel CRM
Bidirectional sync of contacts, call routing, SMS notifications. Coming soon.
📊
QuickBooks
Push invoices, sync payments, automate 1099 reporting. Coming soon.
🏔
MountainSeed Portal
Auto-upload delivered reports to vendor portal. Coming soon.
📦
Modum Data Service
Auto-pull comparable property data for Modum-based reports. Coming soon.
Notifications
Daily reports, alert preferences, and notification schedules
🔔
Notification Preferences
Configure daily report recipients, deadline alerts, status change notifications, and quiet hours. Daily email recipients (currently per-device) will become firm-wide settings. Coming soon.
Backup & Export
Full data export and restore for backup and compliance
💾
Data Export & Restore
Export all jobs, settings, and audit logs to a JSON archive. Restore from a previous archive. Schedule automatic weekly backups. Coming soon.
Danger Zone
Destructive actions cannot be undone
Clear All Jobs
Deletes every job and inspection placement from the tracker. Your Settings (statuses, team members, brands, etc.) are preserved. Use this to reset after bulk-load testing.
Currently: — jobs in tracker
Reset Everything
Deletes all jobs AND resets every settings list back to defaults. The full nuclear option. Email recipients on this device are also cleared.
Will affect: Jobs, Settings, Email recipients
New Job
Job Details
Each property gets its own assignment with a letter suffix (A, B, C…) under the same contract number.
Additional Properties Property A is the main entry above · add B, C, D below

→ Send to Que
Record the payment intake details before this job moves to In Que. Production will not begin until this is complete.
Net to FCV will be calculated automatically (Amount Paid minus Banking Expenses).
Net to FCV
$0.00
✓ Close Job
Confirm and add any final expenses for this assignment before closing. These will be recorded in the project financials.
Add Expense
Financial Summary
Bulk Add Jobs · Paste from Excel
Required Column Order
Job #
Client Name
Address
Due Date
Fee
Contract Date
Instructions: Copy the columns above (in this order) directly from Excel and paste below. Tab-separated. Header row optional (auto-detected). Date formats accepted: 1/15/26, 01/15/2026, 2026-01-15.
Defaults applied: Status = "In Que" · Priority = "Standard" · Inspection = No · All other fields blank (editable inline on the tracker).
Tip: in Excel, select your six columns, copy (Ctrl+C), then paste here.
